offer: For law firms processing 5–15 invoices/month, manual reconciliation causes cash flow gaps. We simplify the reconciliation process instead of manual reconciliation using spreadsheets.
problem: manual invoice reconciliation is time-consuming and error-prone.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for law firms seeking help

pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path

automation_simplification_ideas: Allow CSV import for existing data
